name: unui-codex-plugin
description: Codex workflows for working on unUI.

interface.shortDescription: Project-aware UNUI workflows and UI evidence.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for developing, reviewing, and maintaining the UNUI codebase, including UI style evidence from the UNUI API.
defaultPrompt: Use $unui to design a custom-domain settings page with DNS, verification, and SSL states.
Use $unui to create a dense dashboard UI from related style evidence.
Use $unui to build a login and authorization flow that fits this product.
